all_candidates.topic: Should E20 petrol be mandatory despite lower mileage and higher cost?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The government acknowledged on July 10, 2026, that E20 petrol is costlier to produce and may reduce fuel economy by 3-5% for some vehicles.

all_candidates.topic: Should petrol pumps offer non-E20 fuel options to consumers?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Amid consumer backlash over E20 petrol's impact and the absence of pure petrol or E10 at pumps, the government defended its rollout on July 10, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Should tech companies compensate freshers for delayed/withdrawn offers?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Reports from July 9, 2026, indicate that fresh engineering graduates are facing delayed onboarding or withdrawn job offers from major tech companies.

all_candidates.topic: Is limiting UPI balance checks to 50 times daily justified?
all_candidates.news_anchor: NPCI's updated UPI guidelines, effective June 5, 2026, set a limit of 50 balance checks per day per app to prevent system overload.

all_candidates.topic: Should brands be liable for immediate replacement of defective products?
all_candidates.news_anchor: A LocalCircles report highlights that nearly 50% of consumers are stuck with defective high-value products due to a broken redressal system.

all_candidates.topic: Are AI-driven tech layoffs justified for productivity gains?
all_candidates.news_anchor: India's IT sector could see 35,000 job cuts in 2026 through "silent layoffs" as firms prioritize productivity and AI integration, as reported on July 12, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Should companies invest more in reskilling for AI roles than layoffs?
all_candidates.news_anchor: A report on July 6, 2026, highlighted India's paradox of high AI-driven tech layoffs alongside surging demand for AI talent.

all_candidates.topic: Should exam bodies extend entry deadlines for national exams?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Several students were denied entry to the NEET-UG 2026 re-examination on June 22, 2026, due to late arrival, sparking heartbreak and debate.

all_candidates.topic: Should the NTA's operational structure be reformed for exams?
all_candidates.news_anchor: A health panel is scheduled to discuss the functioning of the NTA and NMC on July 16, 2026, following allegations of paper leaks.

all_candidates.topic: Should banks be more liable for losses from digital loan fraud?
all_candidates.news_anchor: A man was arrested in Punjab on July 12, 2026, for his role in a digital loan fraud racket using stolen Aadhaar and PAN details.

all_candidates.topic: Should UPI auto-debit mandates be restricted to non-peak hours?
all_candidates.news_anchor: New UPI rules, effective June 5, 2026, mandate that auto-debit payments for EMIs and subscriptions be processed only during designated non-peak hours.

all_candidates.topic: Should Delhi restrict new petrol/diesel vehicle registrations?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Delhi's Electric Vehicle (EV) Policy 2.0, released around July 10, 2026, proposes gradually restricting registrations of selected petrol, diesel, and CNG vehicles.

all_candidates.topic: Is displaying payee bank names mandatory for all UPI transactions?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Updated UPI operational guidelines, effective June 5, 2026, state that UPI apps must display the payee's registered bank name before completing a transfer.

all_candidates.topic: Is a 3-hour deadline for AI deepfake takedowns practical for platforms?
all_candidates.news_anchor: On February 10, 2026, India's IT rules set a strict 3-hour deadline for platforms to remove flagged AI-generated content and deepfakes.

all_candidates.topic: Is mandatory submission of parents' SIR details for new voters fair?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Recent reports from July 12, 2026, indicate that new voters must now submit their parents' SIR details for inclusion in electoral rolls.

all_candidates.topic: Will removing import duties on electronics parts benefit consumers?
all_candidates.news_anchor: India recently removed import duty on select smartphone and electronics parts.

all_candidates.topic: Should urban metro policies prioritize last-mile connectivity?
all_candidates.news_anchor: India's Metro Rail Policy, discussed as part of urban mobility reforms (June 15, 2026), emphasizes multimodal integration and last-mile connectivity.

all_candidates.topic: Is the revised AATO amendment timeline beneficial for businesses?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The GSTN revised the timeline for Aggregate Annual Turnover (AATO) amendments, effective July 1, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Is a 3-year limit for GST return filing fair to businesses?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The GST rules applicable in 2026 include a 3-year time bar on GST return filing.

all_candidates.topic: Is mandatory MFA for GST portal users effective against fraud?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Mandatory multi-factor authentication (MFA) for GST portal users, applicable in 2026, became mandatory for all taxpayers from April 1, 2025.
